title: Project Manager / Business Expert
salary_range: KVTES standard salary €4294.63/month + possible work experience bonuses
meta_description: Apply now for a Project manager / business expert role at Ylivieskan kaupunki. Join a growing team and build your career in Ylivieska.
description: Ylivieskan kaupunki is seeking a Project Manager / Business Expert to join their team in Ylivieska. This role involves implementing the Ylivieska city's share in the Get Your Wings - Internationalization incentive for smaller companies project, which aims to increase companies' understanding of international business and initiate new internationalization measures in the region. The successful candidate will work closely with companies and operators in both regions, contact companies smoothly, and help SMEs in the early stages of internationalization through concrete tools, workshops, and company-specific sparring sessions.
what_we_expect: Experience or know-how in companies' international business and export
Good communication, interaction, and networking skills
Active and self-initiated approach to work
job_responsibilities: Implement the Ylivieska city's share in the Get Your Wings - Internationalization incentive for smaller companies project

Contact companies smoothly and move actively in the business field, helping SMEs in the region in the early stages of internationalization with concrete tools, workshops, and company-specific sparring sessions

Manage and coordinate the project tendering, activation, practical planning, implementation of workshops, trainings, events, cooperation with experts and partners, implementing communication and reporting, documenting results
what_we_offer: The opportunity to work directly on the growth and internationalization of companies
A wide cooperation network (companies, experts, developer organizations)
The opportunity to influence the vitality of the region and the growth of companies
A competent and encouraging work community
The benefits of a stable employer in the city of Ylivieska
search_keywords: project manager business expert ylivieska get your wings internationalization incentive smaller companies project

title: Electrician for industry
salary_range: salary The works will start according to the ag
meta_description: Start your next career step as a Electrician for industry at Eezy henkilöstöpalvelut Oy. Great opportunity in Lappeenranta—apply now.
description: We are looking for experienced electricians with electrical education, several years of experience in electrical installations, valid electrical qualifications and cards, ability to work independently, careful and responsible approach to work, and a B driver's license. We value professional pride, a safe way of working, and firm approaches to the job. This position offers versatile tasks, opportunities to work in different types of locations, support from a professional organization, and competitive salary. The works will start according to the agreement and continue until the end of the year. If you're interested, please send your application at eezy.fi and briefly tell us about your experience.
what_we_expect: Careful and responsible approach to work
job_responsibilities: Perform electrical installations and maintenance tasks in various locations, such as commercial, industrial and public buildings
Handle installation work professionally from start to finish at customer sites
Be responsible for the high-quality implementation of the work
what_we_offer: The opportunity to work in different types of locations
search_keywords: electrician, industry, South Karelia, temporary employment, electrical installations, experience, qualifications, driver's license
